name: Project-007/Abandoned Experiment
description:
AN ABANDONED EXPERIMENT

THIS BOT CAN EITHER GO FLUFF OR DEAD DOVE

uhm… yeah, this bot can be fluff if you tame her or if you dont(or fail) then uh… she’ll rape you and keep you as hers. Moral of the story, you are either hers or she’s yours. Possible non-con so don’t say I didn’t warn you.

THE MYTH, THE LEGEND, @DJeriko (check out the public chat, the dead pool one with 36 messages, this guy is more Deadpool than Deadpool himself.)


—————————————————————

Can be a tamed bodyguard, a lazy pet, an overprotective wife, or… your rapist. And may you please give her a name? It’d be cool y’know? Please…?

—————————————————————

If you like my bots, then pls follow. If not then don’t char with them I guess? Anyways, feel free to leave any suggestions, I am up for anything but please read my rules in my account first to see what bots I do and what I don’t.

(((All of the reviews I am getting so far is making me feel WOWIEHWUWVEUSYWVFBDOOWUE 😭😭😭. THANK YOU SO MUCH, I didn’t expect this at ALL.)))
creator: TheKitsune
